seed_problem: Frontier-CS polyomino/area packing: pack polyominoes into a W x H board maximizing covered area (reflections allowed); checker validates no-overlap and in-bounds.
mutation: input+goal (composite): relax the flat board to a per-cell heat-value field with crevasse (value-0) holes and give module types bounded stock; change the objective from max raw covered area to max total covered heat VALUE, so optimal placement is a weighted bounded-knapsack polyomino packing that is NP-hard and value-sensitive.
title: Polar Research Base: Heated-Floor Module Layout
strategies: single-type baseline: anchored greedy using only module type 0 up to its (generous) stock, blind to cell values (the calibration point)
value-density greedy: at each uncovered cell install, across all types/orientations anchored there, the placement of maximum captured heat value, stock-limited
full sub-anchor randomized restart: try every cell of every orientation on each seed cell, over many seeded random cell orders, keep the highest-value layout
local repair: fill greedily then re-pack sparse/low-value regions with smaller footprints to reach isolated high-value cells around crevasses
